Document:
# Rule 9 - No hacking, exploiting, or using macros.
This rule should be self self-explenatory. Any external tool or program used to gain an advantage or modify the client in some way that gives you an advantage is not allowed.
Additionally, don't abuse bugs to gain an unfair advantage over others.
Subframing is not concidered a bug as of now ## Precedents
- Don't use an external tool such as CheatEngine to give yourself an unfair advantage over other players. - Don't modify your game client in a way that gives you an unfair advantage or for any malicious reasons. - Don't use macros, which are any scripts, programs, or in-built hardware features to automatically execute a series of inputs. - Exceptions for external accessibility tools may be made. If you need to use them, please run them by an admin.
